description: The 'Ndrina Belfiore is a Calabrian criminal organization based in Gioiosa Jonica, with operations in Turin, France, and Spain. It was involved in the 1983 murder of magistrate Bruno Caccia in Turin. The group has been engaged in drug trafficking, including a 1994 seizure of 5 tons of drugs. Recent operations in 2008 and 2018 targeted the clan.

country_links.context: The 'Ndrina Belfiore sourced drugs from Brazil.

country_links.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Belfiore è una organizzazione criminale calabrese di Gioiosa Jonica con insediamenti anche a Torino , in Francia e Spagna .
country_links.context: The 'Ndrina Belfiore has settlements in France.
